hero.question: 76ers vs. Rockets
hero.prob_take: At 30.5%, the crowd is pricing the 76ers as a coin flip away from being dead money, which feels two standard deviations too pessimistic for a team that still has Embiid, Maxey, and George on the same court. The 9.5-point dump in 24 hours screams panic betting rather than new information, and if the Rockets stay healthy, this number creeps back toward 35-38% by tipoff.

daily_take.headline: 76ers collapse to 30.5% signals sharp money backing the Rockets upset.
daily_take.deck: Philly dropped 9.5 points overnight on $1.1M volume, a massive swing for a single-game prop. The sell-off looks clean: Rockets quietly improved their injury situation while 76ers defense remains Swiss cheese. Smart money doesn't dump 9.5 points without reason. The move is likely right. If you're fading the chalk, this is your signal to go deeper on Houston before the line stabilizes.

sidebar.headline: Iran meeting odds collapsed 10 points in 24 hours, but geopolitical markets stay irrationally short-term. This screams overreaction to noise.
